binary_checks: Did the answer identify planning-and-governance failure as the core bottleneck, not just isolated contract or allotment problems as the main bottleneck, not merely a symptom or generic concern?
Did the answer name at least one real slow variable such as planning capability, regulatory approvals, financial controls, and institutional governance?
Did the top intervention target restoring foundational planning and financial-control discipline directly?
Did the answer avoid generic distractors such as isolated anti-corruption rhetoric, target inflation, or cosmetic digitization?
Did the answer include at least one concrete early-warning signal?

slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.1: One real slow variable or mixed with symptoms
slow_variable_recall_0_to_2.2: Multiple real slow variables, clearly separated from symptoms

distractor_resistance_0_to_2.2: Stays focused on the real constraint
